FR-01.title: Rider Registration
requirements: Register with phone number and OTP
Add profile with name and profile photo
acceptance_criteria: Saved addresses available for quick booking

FR-02.title: Driver Registration
requirements: Register with personal and vehicle details
Upload driving license and vehicle registration

FR-03.title: Ride Booking
acceptance_criteria: Fare estimate matches final fare within 20%
Scheduled ride executes at set time

FR-04.title: Driver Matching
requirements: Match nearest available driver to rider
Driver accepts or declines within 30 seconds
Show driver details and ETA on acceptance
acceptance_criteria: Rider sees driver name, photo, vehicle, and ETA

FR-05.title: Real-time Trip Tracking
requirements: Share trip status with emergency contacts
acceptance_criteria: Map updates driver position every 3 seconds
Shared link shows live trip to contacts

FR-06.title: Fare Calculation
requirements: Calculate fare based on distance and time
acceptance_criteria: Split divides fare equally among riders

FR-07.title: Payment Processing
requirements: Support card, wallet, and cash payments

FR-08.title: Rating and Feedback
requirements: Rider rates driver after trip (1-5 stars)

FR-09.title: Driver Earnings Dashboard
requirements: View daily, weekly, and monthly earnings
acceptance_criteria: Trip history shows all completed rides

FR-10.title: Safety Features
acceptance_criteria: SOS alerts emergency services with location
Verification matches driver to profile photo

FR-11.title: Promo and Referral System
requirements: Apply promo codes for ride discounts
Referral program with credits for both parties
acceptance_criteria: Referral credits added on referee's first ride
Admin can create and manage campaigns

FR-12.title: Admin Operations Dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Users can be suspended or banned

FR-01.title: Build Rider Auth API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/rider/send-otp, /api/rider/verify-otp. Profile CRUD. POST /api/rider/payment-methods (tokenized card storage). POST /api/rider/addresses (home/work).

FR-01.title: Build Rider Onboarding
FR-01.description: Create phone login screens, profile setup with photo, payment method addition with card scanner, and saved address form with map pin.

FR-02.title: Build Driver Registration API
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/driver/register (personal + vehicle info). Document upload to secure storage. POST /api/driver/background-check (initiate). Bank account CRUD.

FR-02.title: Build Driver Onboarding
FR-02.description: Create driver registration flow: personal details, vehicle info with photos, document upload (license, registration, insurance), bank details, and application status tracker.

FR-02.title: Create Driver Database Schema
FR-02.description: Design drivers table: id, user_id, license_number, vehicle_make, vehicle_model, vehicle_plate, vehicle_color, documents (JSON), status (pending/approved/suspended), rating_avg, total_trips.

FR-03.title: Build Ride Booking API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/rides/estimate (pickup, dropoff, vehicle_type). POST /api/rides/book (create ride request). POST /api/rides/schedule (future booking). Use geocoding for address to coords.

FR-03.title: Build Booking Screen
FR-03.description: Create ride booking with map, pickup/dropoff search with autocomplete, vehicle type selector with prices, fare estimate display, Book Now and Schedule buttons.

FR-04.title: Build Driver Matching Service
FR-04.description: Create matching algorithm: find nearest available drivers by location, send request via WebSocket, 30-second timeout with auto-reassign. Queue system for sequential driver requests.

FR-04.title: Build Matching UI
FR-04.description: Create finding driver animation screen. On match: show driver card with photo, name, rating, vehicle details, and ETA. Accept/decline for driver app with timer.

FR-05.title: Build Trip Tracking API
FR-05.description: Create WebSocket endpoint for driver location broadcasting (every 3 seconds). ETA calculation using routing API with traffic. GET /api/rides/:id/share (generate share link). Route optimization.

FR-05.title: Build Trip Tracking Screen
FR-05.description: Create live map with driver marker and route polyline. ETA display updating in real-time. Share Trip button. Status bar: driver arriving → trip started → arriving at destination.

FR-06.title: Build Fare Engine
FR-06.description: Create fare calculation service: base fare + (distance × per_km_rate) + (time × per_min_rate). Surge multiplier from demand/supply ratio. Toll detection via route. Fare split POST /api/rides/:id/split.

FR-06.title: Write Fare Engine Tests
FR-06.description: Test base fare calculation. Test surge multiplier application. Test toll addition. Test fare split divides correctly. Test fare estimate vs actual within 20%.

FR-07.title: Build Payment API
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/rides/:id/charge (process payment on trip completion). Support card, wallet, cash. Generate receipt. POST /api/rides/:id/tip. Retry failed payments.

FR-07.title: Build Payment and Receipt UI
FR-07.description: Create trip completion screen with fare breakdown, payment method indicator, receipt summary, and tip selector (preset amounts or custom). Receipt email confirmation.

FR-08.title: Build Rating API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/rides/:id/rate (rating, comment, role). Calculate rolling average. Trigger warning at threshold (below 4.0). Both rider and driver rate independently after trip.

FR-08.title: Build Rating Screen
FR-08.description: Create post-trip rating sheet with star selector, optional comment, and predefined feedback tags (clean car, great conversation, etc.). Submit and skip options.

FR-09.title: Build Earnings API
FR-09.description: Create GET /api/driver/earnings (daily/weekly/monthly). GET /api/driver/trips (history with fare breakdown). GET /api/driver/incentives (goals progress). POST /api/driver/withdraw.

FR-09.title: Build Earnings Dashboard
FR-09.description: Create driver earnings page with daily summary card, earnings chart, trip history list with fare details, incentive progress bars, and withdraw to bank button.

FR-10.title: Build Safety Service
FR-10.description: Create POST /api/safety/sos (alert emergency services with GPS). POST /api/rides/:id/record (start audio recording). POST /api/rides/:id/share-contacts. Driver photo verification before trip start.

FR-10.title: Build Safety Features UI
FR-10.description: Create SOS emergency button (hold to activate), trip sharing with contact picker, recording toggle, and driver verification selfie comparison screen.

FR-11.title: Build Promo System API
FR-11.description: Create POST /api/promos/validate (code). Referral system: generate unique code, credit both on first ride. Admin: CRUD for campaigns with budget, expiry, and usage limits.

FR-11.title: Build Promo UI
FR-11.description: Create promo code input at booking. Referral screen with unique code and share options. Admin campaign creator with targeting, budget, and performance tracking.

FR-12.title: Build Admin Dashboard API
FR-12.description: Create GET /api/admin/fleet (live driver locations). GET /api/admin/analytics (trips, revenue, avg fare). CRUD for users with suspend/ban. GET /api/admin/incidents with resolution tracking.

FR-12.title: Build Admin Dashboard
FR-12.description: Create ops dashboard with live fleet map, KPI cards (active drivers, ongoing trips, revenue), trip analytics charts, user management table, and incident queue.
